name: DevOps & CI/CD
description: Source control, CI/CD pipelines, artifact management, and IaC — build failures, deployment frequency, and secret exposure.
quickTip: Forward CI/CD logs (Jenkins, GitHub Actions) via webhook or log file monitoring to Splunk.

subcategories.name: Source Control
subcategories.primaryAppTa: GitHub TA, GitLab webhook inputs, custom API inputs (Bitbucket, Azure DevOps).

subcategories.name: CI/CD Pipelines
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Jenkins TA (`TA-jenkins`), custom webhook receivers for GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/ArgoCD.

subcategories.name: Artifact & Package Management
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom API inputs (Artifactory, Nexus), webhook receivers.

subcategories.name: Infrastructure as Code
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom log inputs from CI/CD pipelines, Terraform Cloud API, Ansible callback plugins.

subcategories.name: GitOps & Deployment Automation
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Argo CD, Splunk Add-on for Kubernetes, GitHub Actions log forwarder, GitLab CI integration, Splunk Connect for Helm/Flux metrics, custom HEC for GitOps APIs.

subcategories.name: DevOps Trending
subcategories.primaryAppTa: GitHub Add-on / webhooks, GitLab integrations, Jenkins log/metrics forwarders, Splunk CI/CD content for DORA-style KPIs.
subcategories.dataSources: `index=devops` with `sourcetype=github:*`, `sourcetype=jenkins:*`, `sourcetype=gitlab:*`. Normalize repository, pipeline, environment, and conclusion fields across tools before building executive DORA panels.
